overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves along a sunlit urban street beneath elevated highways, passing graffiti-covered walls, pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles. The scene transitions from a narrow sidewalk to a busy intersection at the Ebunike metro station before continuing along a construction-lined corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with street art

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the massive elevated highway structure, passing urban decay elements

notable_agents.action: child sitting on the curb next to the graffiti wall

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overhead highway structure casting strong shadows on the street below
brown wall with large white praying hands stencil graffiti and text banner
multi-story urban buildings with fire escapes and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a shaded sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. A prominent graffiti wall featuring praying hands dominates the right side, while sparse pedestrians and a child sitting on the curb populate the scene. The atmosphere is urban and slightly gritty, with the overhead structure creating a canyon-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching major intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

events.description: passing a group of pedestrians walking in the same direction, requiring slight navigation
futuristic white sedan with red trim drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching a busy intersection, passing other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with cybernetic tattoos walking toward the camera
futuristic white sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street ahead, indicating a warmer climate zone
metro station entrance with distinctive architecture becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up slightly with palm trees and the Ebunike metro station visible ahead. Pedestrian density increases, and a shirtless man with tattoos walks toward the camera. A futuristic white sedan passes by on the left, and the graffiti wall from the previous segment falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection at Ebunike metro station with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk at the Ebunike metro intersection
crossing the street while traffic light shows green, navigating around other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection near the Ebunike metro station entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white tank top and jeans crossing the street in the same direction
white van stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: red rectangular metro sign with white text 'M Ebunike' mounted on a pole
traffic signal showing green light for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the wide intersection at Ebunike metro station, marked by a prominent red metro sign. The ego crosses the street on a green light, sharing the crosswalk with other pedestrians including a woman in a white tank top. A white van waits at the intersection, and the view opens up to show more of the futuristic cityscape with towering buildings and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barriers and urban decay elements

events.description: completing street crossing and turning right onto the opposite sidewalk
passing by yellow construction barriers that partially obscure the view of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past construction barriers and various street elements, maintaining a steady pace through the urban environment

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt and red pants standing near the wall
person walking away from camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow and black striped construction barriers and concrete blocks lining the sidewalk
building facade with green awning and yellow trim, appearing to be a small shop

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk, now passing yellow construction barriers and a green storefront. The street shows signs of urban decay with trash bags and cardboard boxes scattered about. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the elevated highway structure remains visible in the distance as the journey continues through the sunlit cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, shaded urban underpass into a bright, expansive city intersection and back into a construction-lined corridor. It begins by walking along a shaded sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a prominent graffiti wall of praying hands and a child sitting on the curb. As the camera moves forward, the narrow canyon-like atmosphere opens up to reveal palm trees and the Ebunike metro station, while the graffiti fades behind and a futuristic white sedan glides past. The scene then expands into a wide, sunlit intersection where the camera crosses the street beneath a red metro sign alongside other pedestrians and waiting vehicles. Finally, the view shifts toward a sidewalk lined with yellow construction barriers and a green storefront, moving past scattered trash and cardboard boxes as the elevated highway recedes into the distance.
